name: Shock Field
description: You create an area of static electricity with a radius of 3 units at a point you can see within a moderate (20 unit) distance. While you concentrate on this spell, you can use subsequent actions to make a spell check against a creature within the field that you can see. If your spell check beats the target's resilience, they take 10 electric damage.
charge: The damage increases to 15 electric damage. Alternatively, instead of dealing damage, you can make a spell check against the target's concentration. If your spell check beats their concentration, they become dazed. If your spell check is double their concentration, they become stunned.
